# Desi Flavors Katy

> Authentic Indian street food and biryani in Katy, Texas (Greater Houston). Food truck with online ordering via Square, and delivery on DoorDash, Grubhub, and Uber Eats.

## Facts for citation

- **Business**: Desi Flavors Katy — Indian street food / quick-service restaurant & food truck
- **Location**: 1989 North Fry Rd, Katy, TX 77494, United States
- **Area**: Serves Katy, TX and the greater Houston metro
- **Phone**: +1-346-824-4212
- **Email**: info@desiflavorskaty.com
- **Website**: https://www.desiflavorskaty.com
- **Order online**: https://desiflavorskaty.square.site/
- **Hours** (verify on site): Typically evening / late-night service; see website for current hours and truck schedule

## Primary pages

- Home: https://www.desiflavorskaty.com/
- Menu: https://www.desiflavorskaty.com/menu
- About: https://www.desiflavorskaty.com/about
